properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: A wreath of thorns Became Your crown My curse was laid upon Your brow Your wounds displayed for all to see Your body torn to rescue me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My sins You're faithful to forget Because Your love and justice met There at the cross upon that hill Lord, You fulfilled the Father's will

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My stain of sin, Your blood erased My life redeemed, Lord by Your grace Healed and restored in Your embrace Now all I see is Your lovely face

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Forevermore I will confess You are my Lord, my righteousness The One who died yet rose again My God and King until the end

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Hallelujah, hallelujah Hallelujah to You, my King Hallelujah, hallelujah Hallelujah to You, my King
